    name = optional(string)

    cidr_ipv4                    = optional(string)
    cidr_ipv6                    = optional(string)
    description                  = optional(string)
    from_port                    = optional(number)
    ip_protocol                  = optional(string, "tcp")
    prefix_list_id               = optional(string)
    referenced_security_group_id = optional(string)
    tags                         = optional(map(string), {})
    to_port                      = optional(number)
  }))

zipkin.description: A map of tags to add to all resources
zipkin.name: tags

zipkin.description: Name of security group
zipkin.name: name

zipkin.description: Description of security group
zipkin.name: description

zipkin.description: Preset ingress rule definitions for this service. Defaults to the curated catalog set; pass `{}` to disable, or override individual entries
zipkin.name: preset_ingress_rules

zipkin.description: Map of IPv6 CIDRs to apply across the preset ingress rules. Map keys are user-supplied identifiers; values are the CIDRs. Each entry produces one ingress rule per preset rule
zipkin.name: ingress_cidr_ipv6

zipkin.description: Whether to enforce that only the rules declared by this module exist on the security group. When true, out-of-band rules added via the AWS console or other Terraform configurations will be reverted on next apply
zipkin.name: enable_exclusive_rules

zipkin.description: Controls if resources should be created (affects nearly all resources)
zipkin.name: create

zipkin.description: Whether to use the name (`name`) as a prefix, appending a random suffix
zipkin.name: use_name_prefix

zipkin.description: ID of the VPC where the security group is created
zipkin.name: vpc_id

zipkin.description: Map of IPv4 CIDRs to apply across the preset ingress rules. Map keys are user-supplied identifiers; values are the CIDRs. Each entry produces one ingress rule per preset rule
zipkin.name: ingress_cidr_ipv4

zipkin.description: Map of source security group IDs to apply across the preset ingress rules. Map keys are user-supplied identifiers; values are the security group IDs. Use `self` as a value to reference the security group created by this module. Each entry produces one ingress rule per preset rule
zipkin.name: ingress_referenced_security_group_id

zipkin.description: Additional security group ingress rules to merge with the preset rules
zipkin.name: ingress_rules
zipkin.type:
map(object({
    name = optional(string)

    cidr_ipv4                    = optional(string)
    cidr_ipv6                    = optional(string)
    description                  = optional(string)
    from_port                    = optional(number)
    ip_protocol                  = optional(string, "tcp")
    prefix_list_id               = optional(string)
    referenced_security_group_id = optional(string)
    tags                         = optional(map(string), {})
    to_port                      = optional(number)
  }))
